hero.title:
Heavy Machinery.
Skilled Hands. Reliable Results.
hero.subtitle: Taj Al Sharq United delivers integrated construction, equipment rental, transportation and manpower solutions — engineered for uptime, safety and on-schedule delivery across the Kingdom.

overview.title: A Leading Force In Construction & Support Services
overview.lede: Taj Al Sharq United Company operates across construction and support services, offering integrated solutions that include construction and infrastructure works, equipment rental, and truck transportation, along with specialized labor, operators and drivers.
overview.check1: Trusted by industry leaders including Aramco, Hassan Allam and SEC
overview.check2: Modern fleet maintained to OEM specifications
overview.check3: Certified operators, technicians and site crews
overview.check4: Strong commitment to quality, safety and professionalism

whyUs.title: Built On Reliability, Engineered For Results
whyUs.safetyDesc: Every operation follows strict HSE protocols, with certified operators and regularly inspected machinery.
whyUs.fleetDesc: A diverse, well-maintained equipment fleet ready to deploy for projects of any scale.
whyUs.deliveryDesc: Efficient logistics and planning ensure equipment and crews arrive exactly when your project needs them.
whyUs.supportDesc: Our team stays on call to keep your operations running without costly downtime.

fleet.title: Equipment Categories
fleet.lede: From earthmoving to aerial access, our fleet covers every phase of your project.

featured.title: Ready To Deploy On Your Site

services.title: Integrated Services For Every Project Phase
services.constructionDesc: High-quality construction and contracting services focused on safety, precision and timely delivery.
services.rentalDesc: A wide range of modern heavy equipment supporting project requirements with efficiency and reliability.
services.transportDesc: Safe, efficient transport of goods and materials through a reliable fleet of trucks.
services.manpowerDesc: Qualified workers, skilled labor and experienced drivers for projects of every scale.
services.integratedDesc: Complete, end-to-end project solutions tailored to client needs from planning to execution.
services.supportDesc: Responsive coordination and maintenance support to keep every site running without delay.

testimonials.title: What Our Partners Say
testimonials.t1quote: Taj Al Sharq United mobilized cranes and operators for our site within 48 hours. Their coordination kept our schedule on track from day one.
testimonials.t2quote: The fleet condition and operator discipline are consistently excellent. A dependable partner for our earthworks and transport needs.
testimonials.t3quote: Manpower supply was fast and well-qualified. Their team integrated seamlessly with our own crews on a tight industrial schedule.
testimonials.t4quote: Their transportation division delivered heavy materials on time, every time, with clear communication throughout.

faq.q1: Which areas of Saudi Arabia do you serve?
faq.a1: We are based in Jeddah and serve projects across the Western Region, with capability to mobilize equipment and crews nationwide depending on project scope.
faq.q2: Do you provide operators with rented equipment?
faq.a2: Yes. All equipment rentals can include certified, experienced operators, or be supplied as dry-hire for clients with their own qualified staff.
faq.q3: How quickly can equipment be mobilized to site?
faq.a3: Standard mobilization is typically 24–48 hours depending on equipment type and site location, with expedited options available for urgent requirements.
faq.a4: We support commercial construction, infrastructure, industrial, cement, steel and energy-sector projects among others.
